creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sebastien Pedron from comment #3)
> However, the problem with libreoffice comes from pkgconf: pkgconf doesn't
> support .pc files not terminated by a newline. This is the case of
> cppunit.pc. Thus, it fails to read the "Cflags: -I${includedir}" line (the
> last of the .pc file) and returns "-I" when asked for cppunit's CFLAGS. This
> "-I" is converted "-isystem" by libreoffice's Makefile.

pkgconf is now fixed upstream and the bugfix was imported in the ports tree in r363986.

Both failures are now addressed. Could you please restart this exp-run?
